series_metadata.series_title: Copies of Purchase Requisitions, Orders, and Billing Records for Data Processing Services
series_metadata.series_description: This record series supersedes General Schedule # IT-AD-05 Authorization # 770-1801 dated 8/17/05. Copies of records created to initiate the purchasing process, authorize and provide funds for, or satisfy claims and expedite payments for private service providers inculding copies of purchase orders, invoice requests, receipts, agency vouchers, service reports, and other supporting documentation.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: yearly IT State Audit is complete, audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved ; Paper: yearly IT State Audit is complete, audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved
